requestPage.title: Request your personalized quote
requestPage.description: Fill out the form and our team will get back to you within 24 business hours with a tailored proposal for your business.

fields.name: Full name
fields.messagePlaceholder: What do you need? Share any details that help us prepare a better proposal.

requestPage.privacy: By submitting this form you agree to our privacy policy. We will only contact you about your request.

success.title: Request received!
success.description: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will review your information and get back to you within 24 business hours.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page
notFound.description: The page you're looking for may have moved, been renamed, or never existed.

hero.subtitle: A modern solution for service businesses that need to capture leads, organize quotes, and follow up on every opportunity from a single place.

benefits.title: Everything your sales team needs
benefits.description: Built for service businesses that want to respond faster, never miss an opportunity, and ditch manual processes.

items.title: More clients, fewer missed opportunities
items.description: Capture requests from your website and organize every opportunity in a clear flow your team can handle without losing anything.

items.title: Faster quotes
items.description: Manage requests and generate professional proposals in minutes, with templates, client data, and follow-up built in.

items.title: Smart follow-up
items.description: Stay on top of every client and every conversation. Reminders, statuses, and notes so you never forget the next step.

items.title: Everything in one place
items.description: Centralize all your commercial information on a single platform. Search clients, filter opportunities, and export whenever you need.

howItWorks.title: From request to client, in four steps
howItWorks.description: A simple flow that adapts to how your business already works, with zero learning curve.

steps.title: The customer requests information
steps.description: From your website, WhatsApp, or email. QuoteFlow captures the request and automatically turns it into an opportunity.

steps.title: Your business receives the opportunity
steps.description: All client information is organized in a single card: contact, need, estimated budget, and source.

steps.title: Prepare and send the quote
steps.description: Create clear proposals with your service catalog. Attach terms, timelines, and pricing in a professional format.

steps.title: Follow up until you close
steps.description: Automatic reminders, clear statuses, and per-conversation notes. Turn every opportunity into a client.

services.title: Solutions tailored to your business
services.description: QuoteFlow adapts to how your business already captures and serves clients, no matter the industry.

items.title: Professional services
items.description: Firms, agencies, and consultancies that need to organize their proposals and follow up with every client.

items.title: Construction
items.description: Builders and contractors who receive requests from the web and need to respond quickly with formal quotes.

items.title: Maintenance
items.description: Maintenance and installation companies that serve multiple clients and need traceability per request.

items.title: Installations
items.description: Technical teams that scope needs, quote, and close jobs without losing information along the way.

items.title: Consulting
items.description: Independent consultants who want a clear system to capture leads, present proposals, and follow up.

items.title: Local businesses
items.description: Service businesses looking for a modern, professional way to capture clients from their own website.

dashboard.title: A dashboard designed for your sales team
dashboard.description: See the real state of your business: new requests, quotes in progress, active clients, and pending follow-ups — all in one place.

quickAction.title: Quick action
quickAction.description: Create a quote from a request in seconds.

testimonials.title: Teams already working better
testimonials.description: Sales teams across industries use QuoteFlow to respond faster and close more opportunities without losing information along the way.

items.quote: Now we can organize every request and respond to clients faster. The team stopped losing opportunities in email threads.
items.author: Maria Gonzalez

items.quote: We went from tracking follow-ups in a spreadsheet to having everything centralized. Within a week we could see which opportunities were about to close.
items.author: Robert Silva

items.quote: The quote-to-follow-up flow is much clearer for the team. Clients notice we respond faster and with more professional proposals.
items.author: Patricia Lara

ctaFinal.title: Ready to organize your business opportunities?
ctaFinal.description: Request a quote and see how QuoteFlow can help your team capture more clients and respond faster.

footer.description: QuoteFlow helps service businesses capture requests, organize quotes, and follow up on every opportunity from a single place.

metadata.title: QuoteFlow — Smart quotes for service businesses
metadata.description: QuoteFlow turns your customer requests into organized opportunities. Capture quotes, manage clients, and follow up from a single place.
